paper.title: OpenAI and Anthropic share findings from a joint safety evaluation
paper.abstract: OpenAI and Anthropic share findings from a first-of-its-kind joint safety evaluation, testing each other’s models for misalignment, instruction following, hallucinations, jailbreaking, and more—highlighting progress, challenges, and the value of cross-lab collaboration.

review_questions: Can you find specific memory numbers in the paper?
